_comment: Example tag database feeding TASE.2 points from a DNP3 (IEEE 1815) outstation. The gateway is a DNP3 master: it connects outbound to the outstation (default TCP 20000) and reads static points. 'driver':'dnp3'. Read fields: host, port, outstation (address, default 10), master (default 1), group (1=binary input, 30=analog input), variation (analog: 1=int32, 2=int16, 5=float, 6=double; binary: 2), index. Controllable points add a 'control' block with the CROB index and sbo (true=select-before-operate, false=direct operate); the gateway then operates group 12 var 1 on the outstation. Point names must match config/scada.json. To try it with no hardware, run ingest/dnp3_outstation_sim.py and point host at 127.0.0.1.

tags._note: binary input 0 -> breaker status; control operates CROB index 0 via select-before-operate
